mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room ( room_name, room_description, created_by, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{roomName}, #{roomDescription}, #{createdBy}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 'N') )

INSERT INTO chat_room_member ( room_id, member_id, deleted_yn, joined_at, left_at, last_read_at ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{memberId}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 'N'), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted_yn = 'N', joined_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, left_at = NULL, last_read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.room_name AS roomName, r.room_description AS roomDescription, r.created_by AS createdBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, r.deleted_yn AS deletedYn, COALESCE(mc.member_count, 0) AS memberCount, latest.last_message AS lastMessage, latest.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, 0 AS unreadCount FROM chat_room r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM chat_room_member WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY room_id ) mc ON mc.room_id = r.room_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(created_at), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS last_message_at, SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(content ORDER BY created_at DESC, message_id DESC SEPARATOR '|||'), '|||', 1 ) AS last_message FROM chat_message WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY room_id ) latest ON latest.room_id = r.room_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId} AND r.deleted_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT r.room_id AS roomId, r.room_name AS roomName, r.room_description AS roomDescription, r.created_by AS createdBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, r.deleted_yn AS deletedYn, COALESCE(mc.member_count, 0) AS memberCount, latest.last_message AS lastMessage, latest.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, COALESCE(unread.unread_count, 0) AS unreadCount FROM chat_room r JOIN chat_room_member rm ON rm.room_id = r.room_id AND rm.member_id = #{memberId} AND rm.deleted_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) AS member_count FROM chat_room_member WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY room_id ) mc ON mc.room_id = r.room_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(created_at), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS last_message_at, SUBSTRING_INDEX( GROUP_CONCAT(content ORDER BY created_at DESC, message_id DESC SEPARATOR '|||'), '|||', 1 ) AS last_message FROM chat_message WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' GROUP BY room_id ) latest ON latest.room_id = r.room_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cm.room_id, COUNT(*) AS unread_count FROM chat_message cm JOIN chat_room_member requester ON requester.room_id = cm.room_id AND requester.member_id = #{memberId} AND requester.deleted_yn = 'N' WHERE cm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND cm.sender_id <> #{memberId} AND (requester.last_read_at IS NULL OR cm.created_at > requester.last_read_at) GROUP BY cm.room_id ) unread ON unread.room_id = r.room_id WHERE r.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY CASE WHEN latest.last_message_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, latest.last_message_at DESC, r.room_id DESC

SELECT rm.room_member_id AS roomMemberId, rm.room_id AS roomId, rm.member_id AS memberId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS memberName, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(rm.joined_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS joinedAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.left_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS leftAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.last_read_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS lastReadAt, rm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn FROM chat_room_member rm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = rm.member_id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND rm.member_id = #{memberId} AND rm.deleted_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT rm.room_member_id AS roomMemberId, rm.room_id AS roomId, rm.member_id AS memberId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS memberName, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(rm.joined_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS joinedAt, DATE_FORMAT(rm.left_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS leftAt, rm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn FROM chat_room_member rm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = rm.member_id WHERE rm.room_id = #{roomId} AND rm.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY rm.joined_at ASC, rm.room_member_id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( room_id, sender_id, content, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{deletedYn}, 'N') )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.room_id AS roomId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS senderName, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, cm.content AS content, DATE_FORMAT(cm.created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, cm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member crm WHERE crm.room_id = cm.room_id AND crm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND crm.member_id <> cm.sender_id AND crm.last_read_at IS NOT NULL AND crm.last_read_at >= cm.created_at ) AS readCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member crm WHERE crm.room_id = cm.room_id AND crm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND crm.member_id <> cm.sender_id AND (crm.last_read_at IS NULL OR crm.last_read_at < cm.created_at) ) AS unreadCount FROM chat_message cm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.message_id = #{messageId} AND cm.deleted_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.room_id AS roomId, cm.sender_id AS senderId, COALESCE(m.nickname, m.name) AS senderName, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, cm.content AS content, DATE_FORMAT(cm.created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS createdAt, cm.deleted_yn AS deletedYn, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member crm WHERE crm.room_id = cm.room_id AND crm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND crm.member_id <> cm.sender_id AND crm.last_read_at IS NOT NULL AND crm.last_read_at >= cm.created_at ) AS readCount, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_member crm WHERE crm.room_id = cm.room_id AND crm.deleted_yn = 'N' AND crm.member_id <> cm.sender_id AND (crm.last_read_at IS NULL OR crm.last_read_at < cm.created_at) ) AS unreadCount FROM chat_message cm JOIN members m ON m.member_id = cm.sender_id WHERE cm.room_id = #{roomId} AND cm.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY cm.created_at ASC, cm.message_id ASC
